title: Unique Party 59081 Warner Bros Room Decorating Kit | Assorted | Harry Potter | 7 Pcs, multicolored, one size
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: Assorted Harry Potter room decorating kit. 2 honeycomb centerpieces, 3 hanging swirl decorations, and 1 pennant banner.
ENCHANTING DESIGN: Dress up your house just like the enchanting Hogwarts castle with our Harry Potter party decoration kit.
PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Perfect to complete your themed birthday, halloween, Christmas party, school fair, and more.
EASY TO SET-UP: These decorations are made of paper and foil which are very easy to hang and set up.
BPA-FREE: These are BPA-free and totally safe to use.
description: From the manufacturer Harry Potter Birthday Add-On Items These add-on items are the perfect addition to your Raindow Dots Birthday Party. Go bold with a contrasting soild colour theme to complement this range and make your party POP! Are you having helium balloons? Dont forget the curling ribbon and weights!
